_description: Ratchet — floor/max values enforced by check-ratchet.js in CI.

testCount.note: v7.4.2 Kassensturz floor — real baseline 5551 (Bausteine B+D added 19 tests to v7.4.1's 5528) + 5 Baustein E circuit-timeout tests = 5556, floor set to 5555 with 1-test safety buffer.

fitnessScore.note: Architectural fitness score from audit:fitness. File-size warnings on CommandHandlers.js, SelfModificationPipeline.js, PromptBuilderSections.js, AgentLoop.js, and SelfModel.js account for the 3-point gap.

schemaMismatches.note: scan-schemas.js must report 0. Runtime event payloads must match declared schemas. v7.4.1 scanner: 415/415 events covered, 0 mismatches.

schemaMissing.note: audit-schemas.js missing check — catalog entries without schema registrations.

schemaOrphan.note: audit-schemas.js orphan check — schemas without catalog entries.

brokenLinks.note: Internal docs/ links must all resolve.
